meaning: 卡尔加里[加拿大西南部城市]
examples: The original use was typed by Wayne Pearson, in Calgary, who says he wrote the first ever LOL in reply to a gag by someone called "Sprout".
Demand for executives is particularly high in Calgary.
No one wants Calgary to become the new Greenland, where the glaciers are melting fast.
Kevin went on to create and sell several very successful small companies in Calgary.
